description: Style NoteStylish sandals for women from catwalk with the trademark band across the foot. Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from Catwalk makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.Heel: 3''Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with criss cross straps at the forefoot Criss crossing midfoot straps with buckle detailingHas a heel with a white and beige footbedTPR outsole and plastic heel capMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
